ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ergonomic_risk_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ergonomic risk factor */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the ergonomic risk factor */,
  "yes_response" TEXT /* Response for 'Yes' option */,
  "no_response" TEXT /* Response for 'No' option */,
  "things_to_consider" TEXT /* Detailed considerations for the risk factor */,
  "action_to_take" TEXT /* Recommended actions to mitigate the risk */,
  "risk_level" INTEGER /* Risk level associated with the factor (1-5) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device associated with the risk factor */,
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the guidelines table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ergonomic_risk_factors_guideline_id FOREIGN KEY ("guideline_id") REFERENCES guidelines ("guideline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being assessed */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ergonomic risk factor being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was conducted */,
  "yes_response" TEXT /* Response for 'Yes' option */,
  "no_response" TEXT /* Response for 'No' option */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or observations */,
  "follow_up_required" TEXT /* Flag indicating if follow-up is required */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the follow-up action */,
  "assessment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assessment (in_progress, completed, follow_up_required) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the assessment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the assessment */,
  "assessment_score" TEXT /* Overall score or grade of the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_assessments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_assessments_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_assessments_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES ergonomic_risk_factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_assessments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "job_function" TEXT /* Specific job function of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., ergonomics specialist, health and safety officer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guidelines" (
  "guideline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guideline */,
  "guideline_description" TEXT /* Description of the guideline */,
  "guideline_url" TEXT /* URL of the guideline document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guideline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_url" TEXT /* URL of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., video, document, webinar) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training resource */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training was completed */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the training (completed, pending, in_progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "resource_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each ergonomic risk factor
Description of the ergonomic risk factor
Detailed considerations for the risk factor
Recommended actions to mitigate the risk
Risk level associated with the factor (1-5)
Type of device associated with the risk factor

Flag indicating if follow-up is required
Status of the assessment (in_progress, completed, follow_up_required)
User who last updated the assessment
Overall score or grade of the assessment
Specific job function of the employee
Role of the user (e.g., ergonomics specialist, health and safety officer, admin)
Password for the user (hashed and salted)
Last login timestamp for the user
Type of resource (e.g., video, document, webinar)
Status of the training (completed, pending, in_progress)
